text:
Market today: Tech is getting hammered again, and Jamie Dimon's warning about market risks isn't helping. The chip sector, your main focus, is definitely feeling the heat.

Your holdings: QQQ (-2.6%), SMH (-12.19%), SOXL (-46.24%), and QQQI (-3.79%) are all marked 'SELL' and are in the red. Given your margin concentration, these drawdowns are extra painful. CRWD (10.35%) and SPY (1.05%) are holding up, and SPAL (-51.33%) is new and already down hard.

Watch: Keep an eye on the broader market sentiment and any news impacting chip demand or trade relations.

Bottom line: Your concentrated tech and chip holdings are under significant pressure, especially with leverage.
plays: Trim QQQ and QQQI if they break their stops at 670 and 52 respectively.
Consider trimming SMH if it breaks its stop at 540.
No new buys today - hold and watch.
